Thanks for contributing to WasmDock! Please fill out the sections below.
Keep PRs focused — one feature or fix per PR (see CONTRIBUTING.md).
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do, and why? 1-3 sentences. -->

## Type of change

<!-- Check all that apply. -->

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behavior)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / tooling / chore

## Related issues

<!-- Use "Closes #123" so the issue auto-closes on merge. -->

Closes #

## Changes

<!-- Bullet the notable changes a reviewer should look at. -->

-

## Test plan

<!-- Show how you verified this. Tick what you ran locally. -->

- [ ] `ruff check src/ tests/`
- [ ] `ruff format --check src/ tests/`
- [ ] `mypy src/`
- [ ] `pytest -q`
- [ ] Manually verified the affected commands (e.g. `wasmdock doctor`, `build`, `run`)

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated for changed behavior
- [ ] Documentation updated (README / docs / template gallery) if needed
- [ ] Public functions are type-annotated
- [ ] No new linter or type-checker errors
